bead.title: agent: move evidence directory staging+commit out of the land_post_land_finalize main-git lock
bead.description:
PROBLEM: land_post_land_finalize held the main-git lock up to 4m37s (retries=12) under 2 workers, blocking the sibling that entire time (also observed: land_ref_update hold=20-24s, durable_audit hold=19s). 4m37s is 9.2x the 30s TP-021 tracker cap.

ROOT CAUSE: withMainGitLock("land_post_land_finalize", ...) at cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_land.go:1404 wraps landEvidence (execute_bead_land.go:1417), which does  of the whole per-attempt evidence directory (StageDir, execute_bead_land.go:756-768) + On branch main
Your branch is ahead of 'origin/main' by 1 commit.
  (use "git push" to publish your local commits)

nothing to commit, working tree clean (CommitStaged, :771-789) INSIDE the lock. Large evidence dirs (multi-GB per ddx-274943fc) on a large repo make this dominate the hold. ddx-33530e68 moved post-land COMMANDS out of the lock (runPostLandCommand now unlocked at :1375); ddx-3d5678fc moved attempt PREP out of pre_dispatch_commits; NEITHER touched the evidence add+commit — it is the third slow op still locked.

PROPOSED FIX: Perform the evidence  (and evidence working-tree writes) in the private finalization worktree (landingFinalizationWorktree, execute_bead_land.go:1052) OUTSIDE the lock; reacquire withMainGitLock only for the short ref-advancing publish (the evidence commit's ref update / result.NewTip). Preserve preserveAfterEvidenceFailure semantics (execute_bead_land.go:1467) by briefly reacquiring the lock for the preserve/revert ref writes on failure.

NON-SCOPE: the checkout-sync lock window (sibling bead L1); cap enforcement (sibling bead); worktree cleanup (ddx-274943fc).
bead.acceptance:
1. New TestChaos_PostLandEvidenceCommitDoesNotHoldMainGitLock (execute_bead_land_test.go): inject a blocking/slow evidence stage; assert another goroutine acquires .ddx/.git-tracker.lock while the stage is blocked.
2. New TestPerformance_LandPostLandFinalizeLockHoldUnderCap: record land_post_land_finalize lock-hold for a fixture with a representative evidence dir; assert hold < 30s.
3. Existing evidence-landing tests pass (TestLand_*Evidence, TestChaos_PostLandCommandDoesNotHoldMainGitLock).
4. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... -run 'TestChaos_PostLandEvidenceCommitDoesNotHoldMainGitLock|TestPerformance_LandPostLandFinalizeLockHoldUnderCap|TestLand_.*Evidence' -count=1 green.
5. lefthook run pre-commit passes.

events.summary: resource exhausted after cleanup; stopping work loop
